scripts.build: bun run clean && bun install && bun run build:sdk && bun -F @trumbodev/cli build
scripts.dev: bun --conditions=development run build:sdk && bun run cli && bun run cli hub stop
scripts.test:unit: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; bun -F @trumbodev/agents test & p1=$!; bun -F @trumbodev/llms test & p2=$!; bun -F @trumbodev/core test:unit & p3=$!; bun -F @trumbodev/cli test:unit & p4=$!; bun -F @trumbodev/hub test & p5=$!; wait $p1; wait $p2; wait $p3; wait $p4; wait $p5'
scripts.verify:routines: zsh -lc 'cd engine/packages/core && bunx vitest run src/cron/schedule-service.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts'
scripts.format: bun biome format engine/ projects/console/ projects/hub/ projects/samples/
scripts.lint: bun biome lint engine/ projects/console/ projects/hub/ projects/samples/
scripts.fix: bun biome check --write --unsafe --diagnostic-level=error engine/ projects/console/ projects/hub/ projects/samples/
scripts.check: bun biome check --diagnostic-level=error engine/ projects/console/ projects/hub/ projects/samples/ && bun run build:sdk && bun run -F @trumbodev/cli build && bun -F @trumbodev/hub build:webview && bun --parallel -F './engine/packages/**' -F @trumbodev/cli -F @trumbodev/hub typecheck && bun engine/scripts/check-publish.ts
